overall.description: A slow panoramic exploration of a medieval gothic dormitory room from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring stone walls, four-poster beds with blue drapery, and tall arched windows allowing cool natural light to illuminate the detailed interior architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds

events.description: camera approaches the large gothic window, increasing natural illumination significantly

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right to survey the dormitory interior, revealing the first bed and approaching the main window

entered.detail: tall dark wooden cabinet with vertical paneling on the left wall
ornate wooden four-poster bed with heavy blue patterned drapery and curtains
high vaulted stone ceiling with gothic arch architectural details
tall arched window with diamond-patterned leaded glass allowing bright natural light
wooden dressing table with mirror and small items near the window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the left side of a stone-walled gothic dormitory, revealing a dark wood wardrobe and the first four-poster bed draped in blue fabric. As the camera slowly pans right, it approaches a tall arched window that floods the space with natural morning light, illuminating the wooden vanity table and stone architecture.

events.description: passing the bright window area into the darker rear section of the room

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, moving past the window to reveal the second bed and study area

entered.detail: second wooden four-poster bed with blue drapery on the right side of the room
study desk with papers and books against the far wall
large oval mirror with white frame mounted above the desk
wall-mounted wooden shelves holding books and decorative objects

segments.scene_description: Moving past the bright window, the camera reveals a second four-poster bed identical to the first, positioned against the stone wall. The lighting becomes softer and more diffused as the view shifts to a study area featuring a wooden desk, oval mirror, and floating shelves laden with books, transitioning into the darker rear portion of the dormitory.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory exit area with study nook

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic survey by focusing on the far wall with the exit door and coat rack

entered.detail: gothic arched wooden door with decorative fanlight window above, featuring white stone trim
metal coat stand with hanging fabric near the door

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the far right wall of the dormitory, where the lighting is dimmer and more atmospheric. The camera reveals an ornate arched door with stone trim serving as the room's exit, alongside a metal coat rack. The floating shelves and desk remain visible but shift to the left of the frame as the panoramic tour concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep across a gothic dormitory, moving from a brightly lit windowed area into the dimmer, atmospheric depths of the room. It begins on the left side of the stone chamber, passing a dark wood wardrobe and a blue-draped four-poster bed before gliding toward a tall arched window that floods the space with natural morning light. As the camera moves past the brilliance of the window, the lighting softens and diffuses, revealing a second identical bed and a study area equipped with a wooden desk, oval mirror, and floating bookshelves. The scene then shifts further into the darker rear portion of the dormitory, where the light fades to emphasize the textures of the stone walls. Finally, the camera settles on the far right wall, framing an ornate arched exit door and a metal coat rack as the tour concludes.
